SortedCompanyCareers
Company · Careers

Build money the way it should've worked.

Small Brisbane team. Big ambition. We're hiring across engineering, design, ops, and risk. Remote-friendly within Australia, in-person preferred for senior roles.

Why work here.

Most fintech work is incremental — adding a feature to a product that already exists. Sorted is the rare opportunity to rebuild Australian peer-to-peer payments from the rails up. The technical scope is wide (regulated deposits, real-time settlement, mobile-grade UX), the team is small enough that you'll ship things people actually use within your first month, and the rate of "I just shipped that and a real person used it five minutes later" is the highest you'll find anywhere.

What we offer.

  • Real equity, real cash. We pay market salaries; we don't ask you to subsidise the seed round.
  • Brisbane HQ, remote-friendly. WFH any day, in-office Tuesdays and Thursdays for the synchronous bits.
  • Hardware budget. Whatever laptop you want, plus standing desk / monitor / chair if working from home.
  • Real superannuation matching. 12%, not the legal minimum.
  • Time off you actually take. 5 weeks annual + 2-week shutdown over Christmas. Founders take theirs first.
  • L&D budget. $3k/year for whatever helps you ship better.
Open roles

We're hiring.

Engineering

Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS or Android)

Lead the next generation of the Sorted mobile experience. Native Swift / Kotlin. Strong product sensibility required.

Brisbane · Full-time
 Engineering

Backend Engineer (Rust / Solana)

Own the AUDD ↔ wallet pipeline. Solana program experience preferred but we'll teach the rest.

Brisbane / remote-AU · Full-time
 Design

Product Designer

Hold the design system, ship interfaces that work for people who've never touched crypto. Mobile-first portfolio essential.

Brisbane · Full-time
 Risk & Compliance

Compliance Lead

Own AFSL/AUSTRAC obligations, build the second-line risk function. AML/CTF experience required.

Brisbane · Full-time
 Operations

Customer Operations

Be the human behind support. Set the standard for honest, fast responses. Money / fintech background a plus.

Brisbane · Full-time
 Open application

Don't see your role?

Send us a one-page note about what you do well and what you want to build. We read everything.

Always open

Apply.

Tell us a story about something you shipped that you're proud of. We'll write back.
